sigma_analysis_results.rule_description: Detects a Windows program executable started from a suspicious folder
sigma_analysis_results.rule_author: Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), Patrick Bareiss, Anton Kutepov, oscd.community, Nasreddine Bencherchali

sigma_analysis_results.rule_description: Detects the usage of schtasks with the delete flag and the asterisk symbol to delete all tasks from the schedule of the local computer, including tasks scheduled by other users.

Detects disabling of Windows Defender Real-time Protection. As this event doesn't contain a lot of information on who initaited this action you might want to reduce it to a "medium" level if this occurs too many times in your environment

sigma_analysis_results.rule_title: Potential Persistence Via COM Hijacking From Suspicious Locations
sigma_analysis_results.rule_description: Detects potential COM object hijacking where the "Server" (In/Out) is pointing to a suspicious or unsuale location

sigma_analysis_results.rule_title: Change PowerShell Policies to an Insecure Level
sigma_analysis_results.rule_description: Detects changing the PowerShell script execution policy to a potentially insecure level using the "-ExecutionPolicy" flag.

values.ParentCommandLine: C:\Windows\system32\cmd.exe /c "netsh advfirewall set allprofiles state off" 1> fw 2>&1
values.CommandLine: netsh  advfirewall set allprofiles state off

sigma_analysis_results.rule_description: Detects netsh commands that turns off the Windows firewall

sigma_analysis_results.rule_title: New Root Certificate Installed Via Certutil.EXE
sigma_analysis_results.rule_description:
Detects execution of "certutil" with the "addstore" flag in order to install a new certificate on the system.
Adversaries may install a root certificate on a compromised system to avoid warnings when connecting to adversary controlled web servers.

sigma_analysis_results.rule_title: Potential Persistence Via COM Search Order Hijacking
sigma_analysis_results.rule_description: Detects potential COM object hijacking leveraging the COM Search Order

values.CommandLine: C:\Windows\System32\cmd.exe /c C:\Windows\System32\netsh.exe interface ip delete arpcache >C:\Windows\TEMP\ipconfig.out 2>&1

sigma_analysis_results.rule_description: Detects inline Windows shell commands redirecting output via the ">" symbol to a suspicious location

Detects modification of the registry settings used for Internet Explorer and other Windows components that use these settings. An attacker can abuse this registry key to add a domain to the trusted sites Zone or insert javascript for persistence
Adversaries may attempt to gather information about attached peripheral devices and components connected to a computer system.

values.CommandLine: C:\Windows\System32\cmd.exe /c C:\Windows\System32\netsh.exe interface ip delete arpcache >C:\Windows\TEMP\ipconfig.out 2>&1

sigma_analysis_results.rule_description: Detects the use of the redirection character ">" to redicrect information in commandline
